'''chadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:multiformly|multiformly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-d-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:multiformly|multiformly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chadate|chadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chadatesher|chadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatesherĂ«m|chadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadatero|chadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chadateshĂ«|chadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadateshĂ«m|chadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadatero|gokichadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichadateshĂ«|gokichadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadateshĂ«m|gokichadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochadankerom|gochadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochadankeshĂ«|gochadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadankeshĂ«m|gochadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochadankeya|gochadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadaterom|chadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadatemu|chadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chadateya|chadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadaterom|gokichadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadatemu|gokichadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichadateya|gokichadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chadadate|chadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chadadatesher|chadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadadatesherĂ«m|chadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadadatero|chadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chadadateshĂ«|chadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadadateshĂ«m|chadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadadatero|gokichadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichadadateshĂ«|gokichadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadadateshĂ«m|gokichadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochadadankerom|gochadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochadadankeshĂ«|gochadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochadadankeshĂ«m|gochadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochadadankeya|gochadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chadadaterom|chadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chadadatemu|chadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chadadateya|chadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichadadaterom|gokichadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichadadatemu|gokichadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichadadateya|gokichadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠte|chĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠtesher|chĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠtero|chĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠtero|gokichĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠdĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠdĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠdĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠterom|chĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠtemu|chĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠdĂŠteya|chĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠterom|gokichĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠdĂŠteya|gokichĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafdafte|chafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafdaftesher|chafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdaftesherĂ«m|chafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafdaftero|chafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafdafteshĂ«|chafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdafteshĂ«m|chafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafdaftero|gokichafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafdafteshĂ«|gokichafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafdafteshĂ«m|gokichafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafdafnkerom|gochafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafdafnkeshĂ«|gochafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafdafnkeshĂ«m|gochafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafdafnkeya|gochafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafdafterom|chafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafdaftemu|chafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafdafteya|chafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafdafterom|gokichafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafdaftemu|gokichafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafdafteya|gokichafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
